# QA Plan: Sprint 5

**Engine**: Godot 4.6 (pinned 2026-02-12)

**Review Mode**: solo

## Automated Tests Required

### S5-M1 FOLLOWUP-001 — gate debug-vs-release assert behavior — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/data_registry/resolve_api_and_typed_accessors_test.gd:215`
**What to test**:
- The existing `test_resolve_assert_behavior_returns_null_after_assert_fires` must pass in BOTH debug and release runs.

**Two acceptable resolutions** (developer's choice):
- (a) Gate the test with `if OS.is_debug_build(): return # assertion path is debug-only`
- (b) Refactor `DataRegistry.resolve` ASSERT mode to use `push_error` + early-return semantics so the test passes in debug too

**Edge cases to cover**: zero — single targeted fix.
**Estimated test count**: 0 net new (existing test goes 309/310 → 310/310).

---

### S5-M2 TD-005 — broken `tests/gdunit4_runner.gd` — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/gdunit4_runner.gd` (or removal + CI workflow update)
**What to test**:
- Either: `godot --headless --script tests/gdunit4_runner.gd` exits 0 and runs the full unit suite, OR the file is removed and `.github/workflows/tests.yml` no longer references it.
- CI must remain green via `addons/gdUnit4/bin/GdUnitCmdTool.gd` invocation either way.

**Edge cases**: SIGABRT-on-shutdown known issue (per commit `3bc8c22`) — verify exit code via JUnit XML, not process exit code, if runner is fixed.
**Estimated test count**: 0 net new — this is a tooling fix.

---

### S5-M3 SceneManager Story 001 — MainRoot.tscn + CanvasLayers — Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/scene_manager/mainroot_scene_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- Scene loads at `res://scenes/main_root.tscn` without error
- Four CanvasLayer children present with exact names + layer indices: `PersistentHUDLayer` (10, ALWAYS), `ScreenContainer` (Node, PAUSABLE), `TransitionLayer` (100, ALWAYS), `OverlayLayer` (110, ALWAYS)
- `process_mode` values match ADR-0007 spec
- `MainRoot.theme` resolves to `res://assets/ui/parchment_theme.tres` (per ADR-0008)

**Edge cases**: missing theme file, missing CanvasLayer (regression guards).
**Estimated test count**: ~6 (per embedded section).

---

### S5-M4 SceneManager Story 002 — autoload skeleton + state machine — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/scene_manager/autoload_skeleton_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- Autoload boots in `UNINITIALIZED` state
- Transitions to `IDLE` on receipt of `DataRegistry.registry_ready`
- All four states present: `UNINITIALIZED | IDLE | TRANSITIONING | PAUSED`
- Rank ≥6 in `project.godot` autoload table (OQ-8 resolution stamped into ADR-0003)
- `request_screen` rejects calls in `UNINITIALIZED` (returns false / errors gracefully)

**Edge cases**: re-entry into IDLE; rapid signal-fire before subscription.
**Estimated test count**: ~8.

---

### S5-M5 SceneManager Story 003 — request_screen + node-swap — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/scene_manager/request_screen_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- `request_screen(screen_id, transition_type)` is the SOLE external screen-change API
- Node-swap into `ScreenContainer` works for valid screen_ids
- First-launch routing returns to main-menu screen
- Invalid `screen_id` errors with `push_error` + early return; no half-swap
- State machine transitions IDLE → TRANSITIONING → IDLE per request

**Edge cases**: nested `request_screen` during transition (back-to-back queue is Story 010 territory).
**Estimated test count**: ~10.

---

### S5-M6 SceneManager Story 004 — Screen base class + lifecycle hooks — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/scene_manager/screen_base_class_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- All four lifecycle hooks (`on_enter`, `on_exit`, `on_pause`, `on_resume`) declared on `Screen extends Control`
- Hooks fire in expected order across a `request_screen` cycle
- CI grep guard: any subclass of `Screen` that omits any of the 4 hooks fails CI

**Edge cases**: subclass overriding `_ready` without calling `super._ready()`; missing hook detection precision.
**Estimated test count**: ~8.

---

### S5-M7 SceneManager Story 005 — Tween + leak guard — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/scene_manager/tween_transitions_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- All 5 standard transitions present: CROSS_FADE, SLIDE_LEFT, SLIDE_RIGHT, FADE_TO_BLACK, PUSH_MODAL
- `_active_transition_tween` reference maintained
- `kill()` invoked on prior tween before `create_tween()` (leak guard)
- H-01 timing: each transition completes within ±10ms of spec at 60fps
- `Callable.bind` connect/disconnect symmetry on Godot 4.6 (carry-over verification flag from Sprint 4)

**Edge cases**: tween killed mid-flight; transition during pause; `TWEEN_PAUSE_BOUND` default behavior.
**Estimated test count**: ~12.

---

### S5-M8 SceneManager Story 007 — Modal overlay + pause counter — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/scene_manager/modal_overlay_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- `push_overlay(overlay_id, pause_on_open)` increments `_modal_pause_count` when pause_on_open=true
- `pop_overlay(overlay_id)` decrements counter; pause clears only when counter reaches 0
- Nested modals (e.g., overlay A then B) do not unstuck the pause when only B closes
- Counter cannot go negative (defensive assert)

**Edge cases**: pop without matching push; out-of-order pops (B then A); pause survives a `request_screen` if any overlay still active.
**Estimated test count**: ~10.

---

### S5-S1 SceneManager Story 006 — CEREMONY via AnimationPlayer — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/scene_manager/ceremony_transition_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- CEREMONY transition uses `AnimationPlayer` exclusively (NOT `Tween`)
- CEREMONY is distinct enum value from the 5 standard transitions
- `reduce_motion=true` substitutes CEREMONY with instant-cut + reward reveal (S5-N1 territory; this test verifies the hook exists)

**Edge cases**: AnimationPlayer not present on target screen; animation interrupted.
**Estimated test count**: ~6.

---

### S5-S2 SceneManager Story 008 — scene_boundary_persist + save_failed modal — Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/scene_manager/scene_boundary_persist_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- `scene_boundary_persist(reason)` fires ONLY on enter `dungeon_run_view` and exit `victory_moment`
- No other transitions trigger persist
- `save_failed` signal aborts the in-flight transition AND shows "Try Again / Stay Here" cozy modal
- Modal is dismissed by either button choice; "Try Again" re-attempts persist; "Stay Here" stays on current screen
- Accepted limitation: save-load Story 007 (consumer persist/hydrate) is NOT yet implemented in Sprint 5 — test stubs the save dispatcher and validates the SceneManager-side coordination only

**Edge cases**: persist fired during an active overlay; save_failed during pause.
**Estimated test count**: ~10.

---

### S5-N1 SceneManager Story 009 — reduce_motion + offline-replay modal — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/scene_manager/reduce_motion_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- `reduce_motion=true` clamps standard transitions to ≤50ms
- CEREMONY transition substitutes to instant cut + reward reveal
- `PROGRESS_MODAL_THRESHOLD_MS=100` (ADR-0014 §5) gates the offline-replay cozy modal
- Modal auto-dismisses on `offline_rewards_collected`
- Setting persists to interim `user://settings.cfg` (per ADR-0007 §reduce_motion); migration path to Save/Load envelope is documented for V1.0 (per ADR-0007 reduce_motion section)

**Edge cases**: setting flipped mid-transition; modal threshold edge (99ms vs 100ms vs 101ms).
**Estimated test count**: ~10.

---

### S5-N2 SceneManager Story 010 — Edge cases + perf verification — Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/scene_manager/edge_cases_perf_test.gd`
**What to test** (per story §QA Test Cases):
- H-10: input blocked during transition (no spurious clicks)
- H-11: back-to-back `request_screen` queues correctly (no race)
- H-12: BG/FG notification mid-transition handled (per Sprint 1 S1-N2 platform handler)
- Performance: each transition stays within frame budget at 60fps
- Performance verification on target hardware: developer note required if not yet runnable on Steam Deck

**Edge cases**: rapid-tap during CEREMONY; BG fired DURING input-block; tween leaks across BG/FG cycle.
**Estimated test count**: ~12.

## Manual QA Checklist

### S5-M3 SceneManager Story 001 — Editor visual check
**Verification method**: Open `scenes/main_root.tscn` in Godot editor; verify scene tree.
**Who must sign off**: solo (review mode)
**Evidence to capture**: screenshot of editor scene tree showing CanvasLayer values.

Checklist:
- [ ] Four CanvasLayer children visible with correct names
- [ ] `layer` properties match: 10, (Node), 100, 110
- [ ] `process_mode` properties match ADR-0007 spec
- [ ] Theme resource loads without warning

### S5-N4 Quick-spec → ADR propagation
**Verification method**: Read-through of amended ADR-0009 (matchup resolver) + ADR-0008 (UI framework). Confirm control-manifest version bump.
**Who must sign off**: solo
**Evidence to capture**: diff of ADR amendments + control-manifest line bumping `Manifest Version`.

Checklist:
- [ ] ADR-0009 references the matchup-visualization quick-spec
- [ ] ADR-0008 references the dungeon-enemy-visualization quick-spec
- [ ] Control manifest `Manifest Version` field updated to today's date
- [ ] Both quick-spec docs marked `Status: Propagated`

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before Sprint 5 hand-off (run via `/smoke-check sprint`):

1. **Game launches without crash** — full autoload chain initializes: TickSystem (rank 0) → DataRegistry (rank 1) → SaveLoadSystem (rank 2) → Economy (rank 3) → HeroClassDatabase (rank 4) → EnemyDatabase (rank 5) → BiomeDungeonDatabase (rank 6) → **SceneManager (rank ≥6, NEW this sprint)**
2. **MainRoot.tscn loads as the application root** — four CanvasLayers visible, parchment theme cascades
3. **`request_screen` from the autoload routes to a placeholder screen** without error
4. **Modal overlay can be pushed and popped** without leaving the tree paused
5. **Save/load round-trip still works** — full Sprint 4 SaveLoadSystem suite passes (88/88) post-SceneManager autoload addition
6. **DataRegistry still reaches READY end-to-end** — Sprint 3 S3-M8 closure preserved
7. **Full unit suite goes 310/310** (FOLLOWUP-001 closure)
8. **Performance**: launch + screen transition stays within 16.6ms frame budget (no spikes)

---

## Playtest Requirements

**Zero playtest sessions required for Sprint 5.**

Same as prior 4 sprints — Sprint 5 lands SceneManager Foundation + Feature-layer pre-flight authoring; no playable surface or new mechanics. Playtests begin Sprint 6 with the Vertical Slice harness.

The only manual sign-off this sprint is the editor visual check on S5-M3 (MainRoot scene tree) and the ADR read-through on S5-N4.

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (11 net new files projected)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for S5-M3 editor check and S5-N4 ADR read-through (in `production/qa/evidence/` or equivalent)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off) — see scope above
- [ ] No regressions: Sprint 1+2+3+4 cumulative test suite (currently 309/310) goes to 310/310 OR remains stable
- [ ] FOLLOWUP-001 closed in tech-debt register (`docs/tech-debt-register.md`)
- [ ] TD-005 closed (or explicitly migrated to Sprint 6 if scoped out)
- [ ] OQ-8 (SceneManager autoload rank) resolved and stamped into ADR-0003 + control manifest + `project.godot`
- [ ] All Feature-layer epics that ran pre-flight (`hero-roster`, `dungeon-run-orchestrator`, optionally `matchup-resolver` + `combat-resolution` + `floor-unlock-system`) have story files under `production/epics/`
- [ ] Story files updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)

---

## Cross-System Hand-Off to Sprint 6

After this sprint, the following becomes implementable for the FIRST time:

- **Save-load Story 007 (consumer persist/hydrate loop)** — SceneManager Story 008 already wired up the trigger points; Sprint 6 lands the consumer side
- **Save-load Story 012 (scene-boundary persist + abort modal)** — companion to SceneManager Story 008
- **Vertical Slice harness** — needs SceneManager + screen routing + persist hooks; all three land in Sprint 5
- **Feature-layer epic implementation** — pre-flight stories ready for `/dev-story` once Sprint 6 begins

---

## Sprint 5 Risks (mirror of sprint-5.md)

- OQ-8 SceneManager autoload rank still unassigned at S5-M4 start — Story 002 amends ADR-0003 + `project.godot` + architecture.md in lockstep
- `_modal_pause_count` race on nested modals — Story 007 QA Test Cases must include nested-overlay scenarios
- `Callable.bind` connect/disconnect asymmetry on Godot 4.6 — Story 005 verifies before relying on signal disconnect
- Sprint 4 SaveLoad consumer-persist contract not yet implemented — S5-S2 tests against a stub; integration deferred to Sprint 6 (acceptable per story `Out of Scope` clause)

---

## Notes for Developer

- **Read each SceneManager story's `## QA Test Cases` section before authoring tests** — they're the canonical per-AC test specs and were already written during Sprint 1's `/create-stories` pass
- **Use `extends Node` (not `class_name`) for the SceneManager autoload** — same pattern as Sprint 1 TickSystem and Sprint 4 SaveLoadSystem (per accumulated Sprint 1 lessons)
- **Wire DataRegistry.registry_ready signal in S5-M4 only** — UNINITIALIZED → IDLE transition is the contractual gate
- **Pre-flight `/create-stories` runs (S5-M9, M10, S3, N3)** are mechanical; ~5 stories per epic, ~15-30min each. Read each EPIC.md before starting.
- **OQ-8 resolution**: pick rank 7 (after BiomeDungeonDatabase rank 6); update ADR-0003 + architecture.md + control-manifest version + `project.godot` in one commit
